Metadata.description: Portfolio of Thibault Deverge, front-end / end-to-end Next.js developer.

About.body1: Web developer. Before code: a <k>law degree</k>, three years on the <k>roads of Asia</k>, then <k>École 42</k>, where I learned to break down problems and find my own answers.
About.body2: Now a full-time developer at <k>Elloha</k> and a <k>freelancer</k>, I bring that same rigor to every project, from the polished component to the <k>platform shipped to production</k>.
About.body3: From here, my projects do the talking.

Home.subtitle1: Complete web applications, from the interface to the database.
Home.subtitle2: Day to day on Elloha’s SaaS, serving 10,000+ tourism professionals — and freelance platforms shipped to production.

NpEvolution.title: NP-<accent>Evolution</accent>
NpEvolution.intro1: In France, a career skills assessment is a legally regulated journey: every session must be tracked, signed and archived for funding bodies and audits. In practice, that means <k>printed-then-scanned PDFs</k>, <k>paper attendance sheets</k> and email chasing — slow, fragile, error-prone.
NpEvolution.intro2: NP-Evolution replaces that whole chain with a <k>single platform</k> I designed, built and shipped <k>solo, as a freelancer</k> — used daily ever since: the consultancy supervises its consultants, every client fills in their workbooks online, time tracks itself, and the signature seals it all.
NpEvolution.clientRole: Founder of NP-Evolution — a career assessment consultancy
NpEvolution.clientQuote: “[…] an ergonomic solution, simple to use and technically flawless. The result far exceeded my expectations.”
NpEvolution.feat1Intro: Three separate spaces, three dashboards: admin, consultant, client.
NpEvolution.feat1Item1: The consultancy creates its consultants and keeps the overview
NpEvolution.feat1Item2: Each consultant follows their clients: progress, signatures, time spent
NpEvolution.feat1Item3: Clients move forward in their own space: their workbooks and tests, at their own pace
NpEvolution.feat2Intro: The heart of the platform: official PDF workbooks become online forms — down to the signature and the report.
NpEvolution.feat2Item1: Every field saves itself, progress recomputes from 0 to 100% — the client moves at their own pace, the consultant follows live
NpEvolution.feat2Item2: Electronic signature — time-stamped, tamper-proof — triggering the official attendance sheet, ready for funding audits
NpEvolution.feat2Item3: Tests run online, and the AI drafts a first profile analysis the consultant refines before sharing
NpEvolution.hood: Under the hood: ~42,000 lines of TypeScript · 561 tests · 22 data models · Next.js 15

Elloha.title: elloha
Elloha.para1: A French booking platform for hospitality and tourism, used every day by <k>thousands of pros</k> — from independent guest houses to tourism offices.
Elloha.para2: I joined elloha’s front-end team in <k>October 2025</k>, on the back office thousands of professionals open every morning.
Elloha.para1b: I build its back office: <k>planning, bookings, payments</k>.
Elloha.para2Item1: I ship features end to end from Jira tickets — requirements, code, PR — and review my teammates’ work before merge.
Elloha.para2Item2: I build the back-office screens with Material UI: forms, data grids, planning views — within the house design system.
Elloha.para2Item3: I work on the critical paths — bookings, rates and availability, Stripe payments — where I reproduce, isolate and fix QA-reported bugs without regressions.
Elloha.para2Item4: And I keep the rest alive: internationalization in 5 languages, production error tracking with Sentry, gradual legacy cleanup, wiring the front to the C# backend team’s API.
Elloha.para2Stack: React · TypeScript · Next.js · Material UI · Stripe · i18next · Sentry

Manifeste.body: A consultant getting a workbook signed, a hotelier opening their planning: I work <k>for them,</k> not for the demo. Interfaces that <k>explain themselves,</k> code the next developer picks up <k>without a manual,</k> details fixed before anyone notices.
Manifeste.tagline: From the first sketch to production — and to what lives after.

Contact.body: A project, a question, or simply something to talk over —
